{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219242460E30A1F95D6FE281E1C"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606946294121022233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我喜欢的调调，细腻，纯爱！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771132891,"group_id":"7605344044599757848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2obu7249lf43u/gTPcGFcjU2Zajk8CsmXRH9sIbgocy","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3145073679146413","user_name":"喜欢野饭豆的曦月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3145073679146413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605344044599757848","book_info":{"abstract":"会计吴拓连续加班二十小时，猝死后穿进睡前听的那本古早权谋小说，成了开局即“暴毙”的炮灰傀儡皇帝李玉衍。
一睁眼，太后匕首已抵心口，妃嫔是眼线，朝堂全是对手，连吃饭喝水都可能是慢性毒药。
作为前世卷生卷死的社畜，吴拓怒从心头起：
“反正也回不去了，那就索性把这摊烂账——重新做平！”
没有系统，没有金手指，只有一颗来自现代的打工人之魂。
他苟命养伤，暗中查账，拉拢孤臣，甚至亲自下乡调研民生，开挖水渠以工代赈。
满朝皆笑傀儡皇帝异想天开，直到——
他借势捧杀权臣，离间太后党羽，甚至把后宫妃嫔一个个“遣散”出门。
朝野哗然，太后震怒，杀手接连而至。
所有人都以为皇帝疯了。
唯有新科状元林子桓，看穿了他完美演技下的孤注一掷。
那个曾纵情山水、桀骜不羁的天之骄子，第一次心甘情愿俯首称臣。
他为他踏入污浊朝堂，戴上谄媚面具，成为太后手中最锋利的刀。
他为他散尽家财，赌上清誉，在无数深夜翻窗入宫，只为送一碗能解毒的汤药。
他跪在父亲面前，坦陈惊世骇俗的心意：“父亲，我心系之人……并非女子。”
所有人都以为林子桓是太后麾下最得意的猎犬。
只有李玉衍知道，他是只对自己收起獠牙的孤狼。
“陛下要这天下清","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/62ad1039f1c26f7c4cd32297c1f4559c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"素人闲书","author_id":"","book_id":"7605344044599757848","book_name":"陛下，您的死士是状元","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":455,"name":"天作之合","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=455&name=天作之合&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":456,"name":"情有独钟","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=456&name=情有独钟&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605344130402615832","read_count":"156","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"256837"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"95","tags":"双男主,古言权谋,纯爱,天作之合,学霸,魂穿,情有独钟","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/62ad1039f1c26f7c4cd32297c1f4559c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362664&x-signature=c28zCCkAJFlOkkOElWVM34l5XIU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95572345356","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219242460E30A1F95D6FE281E1C"}"},"relate_info_list":[
